title: Binary String With Substrings Representing 1 To N
notes: The time complexity is O(N * log(N)) as the timing ratios increase by ~15x-19x for each 10x increase in N. This matches theoretical expectations since the outer loop iterates over N characters, and the inner loop checks substrings up to length log_2(N) which scales with log(N). The space complexity is O(N) because the hash set stores up to O(N) unique elements.
